description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow should have four jobs: macos monterey 12 on macOS 12, ros 2 foxy on ubuntu-latest with an ubuntu:focal container, ubuntu 20.04 focal on ubuntu-latest with an ubuntu:focal container, and ubuntu 20.04 focal apt on ubuntu-latest with an ubuntu:focal container. Each job should check out the repository, perform setup, and then build and test using custom scripts.
